plan_analysis:
The question hinges on whether the Google Trends search-interest value for the term “ahmadinejad” on 2026-03-11 will be higher, unchanged, or lower than it is on 2026-03-03.  
Information gaps a forecaster still faces:

1. Resolution mechanics – How Google Trends defines and timestamps a daily data point, what “unchanged” means numerically (exact equality? rounding?), and typical day-to-day volatility.
2. Historical base rate – How often the “ahmadinejad” series moves up, down, or stays flat across 8-day windows; typical magnitude of moves; frequency of spikes tied to news.
3. Current state – The latest Google Trends values around 3 Mar 2026 and the immediate trajectory in the preceding weeks.
4. Key drivers – Any scheduled or plausible events between 3 Mar and 11 Mar that could shift interest (e.g., Ahmadinejad statements, Iranian political developments, anniversaries).
5. Contrarian factors – Reasons interest might unexpectedly stay flat or drop (e.g., media censorship, competing news eclipsing Ahmadinejad).

The search strategy therefore:
• Uses Google and Agent for historical patterns and Google Trends methodology.  
• Uses Google Trends and News for the current reading and near-term catalysts.  
• Ensures at least one query explicitly gathers the base-rate statistics via the Agent.  
• Mix of 5 historical (methodology + base-rate) and 3 current (latest data + upcoming news).

queries_planned.intent: Retrieve past yearly trend charts to see frequency and size of daily moves and past spikes.
Learn how Google timestamps daily values, rounding rules, and whether equal numbers across days are common, informing “doesn’t change”.

queries_planned.query: Google Trends volatility day to day
queries_planned.intent: Find analyses/blogs quantifying typical daily variance so forecasters can judge base-rate likelihood of “no change”.
Identify historical events that drove large increases to understand key drivers and their magnitude.

queries_planned.query: Frequency 8-day interest change “ahmadinejad” worldwide last 2 years; compute proportion higher, equal, lower values
queries_planned.intent: Provide quantitative base-rate of increases, flats, decreases across comparable windows.
Obtain precise current value on 3 Mar 2026 and observe immediate trajectory.
Surface any fresh statements, interviews, or controversies that could drive search interest during the forecast window.
Detect any scheduled political happenings (elections, anniversaries, nuclear-talk meetings) that might involve Ahmadinejad and spike searches.
